history.qwen_observation: OpenRewrite failed to apply recipes because Maven could not resolve internal test dependencies (cnj-common-test-core and cnj-common-test-javax), causing a fatal dependency resolution error during project parsing.
history.qwen_rationale: Retrying the chain with explicit RemoveDependency recipes for the unresolvable artifacts should allow OpenRewrite to parse the POMs successfully. Once parsed, the subsequent steps will upgrade plugins, build properties, and apply Java 21 source transformations as intended.
